     it is (re)generated by the master art-Claude during asset generation (V2, V3-gen).
     Replaces the ad-hoc seeds table in docs/design/asset-style-spec.md.
     Source of truth for each row is the asset's art/build/<id>.build.json. -->

# Asset seeds — generated audit log

Provenance record of every committed asset: the seed actually used (first
candidate = `AssetSeed.SeedFor(id)`, re-rolls = `seed+n`), its track, and the
build-half that authoritatively records the rest (model, sampler, sha256s).

Seeds are **provenance, not a reproducibility guarantee** — SDXL is not
byte-reproducible across GPUs. The committed PNG + its `DiffuseSha256` in
`art/build/<id>.build.json` is the real guarantee.

| Id | Track | Seed | Hand-finished | Build-half |
|----|-------|------|---------------|------------|
| town-forge | active | 72462746+1 (candidate c1) | no | (pending build-half) |
| town-market | active | 172757101+4 (candidate c4) | no | (pending build-half) |

| hero-vanguard | active | 72462747+7 (candidate c7) | no | (pending build-half) |
| hero-striker | active | 72462748+0 (candidate c0) | no | (pending build-half) |
| hero-mystic | active | 72462749+3 (candidate c3) | no | (pending build-half) |

Curated by Brian (CP-2, 2026-07-18) from 8 candidates each; BiRefNet cutout + sobel normal
via `art/pipeline/`; heroes trimmed + bottom-anchored on the 512x768 spec canvas.

## U5 batch (P006) — 5 Mine monster portraits, 2026-07-18

| Id | Track | Seed | Hand-finished | Build-half |
|----|-------|------|---------------|------------|
| monster-cave-rat | active | 46130604+11 (candidate, resolved 46130615) | no | `art/build/monster-cave-rat.build.json` |
| monster-tunnel-spider | active | 381603454+2 (candidate, resolved 381603456) | no | `art/build/monster-tunnel-spider.build.json` |
| monster-deep-ghoul | active | 1890321176+6 (candidate, resolved 1890321182) | no | `art/build/monster-deep-ghoul.build.json` |
| monster-ore-golem | active | 324013457+3 (candidate, resolved 324013460) | no | `art/build/monster-ore-golem.build.json` |
| monster-forgeworm | active | 620456500+9 (candidate, resolved 620456509) | no | `art/build/monster-forgeworm.build.json` |

Each generated at 1024² Active settings (28/6.5/dpmpp_2m/karras, no LoRA) via ComfyUI MCP;
BiRefNet cutout (`--trim`) + Sobel normal (`normalmap.py … 2.5`) via `art/pipeline/`. cave-rat and
forgeworm needed 2 escalation rounds (SDXL kept drawing anthropomorphic/clothed rat-people and
humanoid dragon-knight/wyvern interpretations, plus repeated multi-cell concept sheets) before a
clean single-subject, prop-free, non-pedestal draw landed; tunnel-spider and ore-golem cleared on
the first 4-candidate pass. Normal-map QA (bumps brighten toward a swept PointLight2D, per
`art/pipeline/README.md` §3) passed for all 5 with the existing Flip-Y-OFF import convention — no
script or import-setting change needed.
